hero_title_accent: Compliance for VASPs and Digital Assets
hero_subtitle: SFTY structures multi-provider compliance workflows to help Hong Kong VASPs manage onboarding, regulatory rule updates, case management, and audit-ready AML evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Jurisdictional gaps slow Hong Kong AML controls
problem_description: Compliance teams face challenges when Hong Kong-specific AML rules and Travel Rule requirements remain disconnected from existing provider outputs. This fragmentation creates delays, weak audit trails and inconsistent risk visibility during onboarding and case workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes jurisdiction-specific AML rules, Travel Rule data and provider outputs into one operational workflow so VASP compliance teams can manage onboarding, cases and regulatory evidence with consistent audit readiness.
workflow_title: From provider checks to jurisdictional compliance
workflow_description: SFTY structures provider outputs through jurisdiction-specific rules, risk reviews, cases and decisions to preserve evidence and support Hong Kong AML compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Hong Kong VASPs?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides Hong Kong VASPs a compliance layer that connects multiple provider outputs into structured workflows, regulatory rule updates, cases, evidence and reporting aligned with local AML requirements.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support Hong Kong AML workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures onboarding, transaction monitoring, Travel Rule workflows and case management to support Hong Kong AML policies with risk-based routing, alerts, internal review and jurisdiction-specific rule application.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves comprehensive evidence including case history, decision logs and provider outputs to support audit readiness and regulatory review in Hong Kong’s compliance environment.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, creating a connected operational layer without replacing key compliance tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Hong Kong AML providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY connects existing compliance providers, applying internal policies to their outputs, rather than replacing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule or screening services used by Hong Kong VASPs.
final_title: Structure Hong Kong AML compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects multi-provider outputs, regulatory rules and case evidence for Hong Kong VASP compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
